channel.title: Chapter 23: Calibration on Introduction to Machine Learning (I2ML)
channel.description: Recent content in Chapter 23: Calibration on Introduction to Machine Learning (I2ML)

item.title: Chapter 23.01: Calibration vs Discrimination
item.description: We explain the difference between calibration and discrimination, how to diagnose calibration with plots and metrics, when calibration matters, and the common types of miscalibration (over- and underconfidence).

item.title: Chapter 23.02: Calibration Methods
item.description: We cover methods for calibrating predicted probabilities and best practices for data splitting in calibration.
